---
name: Add dork or scenario
about: Propose a new query, dork category, or practical scenario
title: "feat: add [DESCRIPTION]"
labels: enhancement
assignees: Nervi0z
---

**Query / dork**

Use `[target.com]` as placeholder. No real domains.

**Category**

Exposed files / Login panels / Credentials / Infrastructure / Personnel / Other

**What it surfaces**

Specific and concrete — what does this query find?

**Defensive use case**

How does finding this help a defender or investigator?

**Tested?**

Yes / No — untested queries will not be merged.
